suffixes.name: of Cremation
suffixes.text: Monsters deal (70—100)% of Damage as Extra FireMonster Damage penetrates (10—15)% of Fire Resistance

suffixes.name: of Glaciation
suffixes.text: Monsters deal (70—100)% of Damage as Extra ColdMonster Damage penetrates (10—15)% of Cold Resistance

suffixes.name: of Thunder
suffixes.text: Monsters deal (70—100)% of Damage as Extra LightningMonster Damage penetrates (10—15)% of Lightning Resistance

suffixes.name: of Hexing
suffixes.text: Players are Cursed with EnfeeblePlayers are Cursed with Temporal ChainsPlayers are Cursed with Elemental Weakness

suffixes.name: of Chaos
suffixes.text: Monsters deal (70—100)% of Damage as Extra Chaos

suffixes.name: of Acceleration
suffixes.text: Monsters have (20—30)% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed

suffixes.name: of Bolstering
suffixes.text: (40—75)% more Monster LifeMonsters have (40—75)% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield

suffixes.name: of Wasting
suffixes.text: Players have (30—40)% less maximum Life and Energy Shield

suffixes.name: of Defencelessness
suffixes.text: Players have (50—75)% less Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield

suffixes.name: of Suffocation
suffixes.text: Players have (50—75)% less Recovery Rate of Life, Mana and Energy Shield
